description: Doors, windows and their frames and thresholds for doors
Bridges and bridge-sections, towers and lattice masts
Bars, rods, profiles (whether or not hollow), tubes, pipes, unassembled, not welded, made from aluminium, whether or not alloyed, containing not more than 99.3% of aluminium
Products attached (e.g. by welding or fasteners) to form subassemblies
Products in a packaged kit with the necessary parts to assemble a finished product without further finishing or fabrication of the parts (‘finished goods kit’)
